zh.Westchester, New York Colony, British Co: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼維斯斯特
zh.New York Colony, British Colonial Americ: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Dobbs於大約1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼維斯斯特時，他的父親John Dobbs31歲，母親Margerie31歲。他於大約1669年與Mary Merritt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1691年4月4日在美國紐約州紐約市布盧可林巴爾倫 易曼德享年62歲。

zh-hans.New York Colony, British Colonial Americ: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Dobbs于大约1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼維斯斯特时，他的父亲John Dobbs31岁，母亲Margerie31岁。他于大约1669年与Mary Merritt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1691年4月4日在美国纽约州紐約市布盧可林巴爾倫 易曼德享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dobbs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Dobb , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, from the medieval personal name Dobb(e), a rhyming pet form of Robert .

History: Arthur Dobbs (1689–1765) was born at Castle Dobbs, County Antrim, Ireland. In 1745 he purchased 400,000 acres of land in NC and was selected as governor in 1754. He married twice and his second wife, wed when he was age 73, was a girl in her teens from NC.

variants.name: Dobb
meanings: English: from the medieval personal name Dobb(e), a rhyming pet form of Robert ; see Dobbe .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.description: After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York
Historical Boundaries 1683: Westchester, Colony of New York, British Colonial America 1776: Westchester, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Dobbs was born about 1630, in Westchester, New York Colony, British Colonial America, his father, John Dobbs, was 31 and his mother, Margerie, was 31. He married Mary Merritt about 1669, in New York Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 April 1691, in Barren Island, Brooklyn, New York City, New York, United States, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Dobbs est né environ 1630, à Westchester, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Dobbs, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margerie, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mary Merritt environ 1669, à New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1691, à Barren Island, Brooklyn, New York City, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Dobbs um 1630 in Westchester, New York Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Dobbs 31 und seine Mutter Margerie 31. Er hat um 1669 in New York Colony, British Colonial America Mary Merritt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. ja.lifeSummary: Walter Dobbsが約1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーウエストチェスターで生まれた時，父John Dobbsは31歳，母Margerieは31歳であった。約1669年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーでMary Merrittと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1691年4月4日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイブルークリンバーレン イスランドで62歳で死去した。

ko.Barren Island, Brooklyn, New York City,: 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 브루클린 배르 이슬랜드
ko.Barren Island, Kings, New York, United S: 미국 뉴욕 주 킨그스 배르 이슬랜드
ko.Westchester, New York Colony, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 웨스트체스터
ko.New York Colony, British Colonial Americ: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Walter Dobbs(이)가 대략 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 웨스트체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Dobbs(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margerie(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1669년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이에서 Mary Merritt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1691년 4월 4일 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 브루클린 배르 이슬랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Dobbs nasceu aproximadamente 1630, em Westchester, New York Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Dobbs, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margerie, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Merritt aproximadamente 1669, em New York Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1691, em Barren Island, Brooklyn, New York City, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Dobbs родился около 1630 г. в местности весчестир, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John Dobbs было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margerie, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Merritt около 1669 г. в местности ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 апреля 1691 г. в местности баррен исланд, бруклин, Нью-Йорк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 62 лет.
